raw.message: One punch to become a boxing legend!💪

hook.summary: A boxer is knocked down but immediately rallies to stand back up.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of a boxer on the mat, followed by a dramatic 'RISE' text animation as he gets up.

scene_flow: A boxer is shown defeated on the ring floor.
The boxer stands up as 'RISE FROM DEFEAT' appears on screen.
Fast-cut sequence of various boxers landing powerful punches.
A final slow-motion punch connects with an opponent's face.
End card displays the game logo and app store download buttons.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy competitive sports and arcade-style fighting games.
